text: I find myself enveloped in the clean, angular architecture of a space dedicated to research and development. The glass walls and modern fixtures evoke a spirit of curiosity and innovation. My attention is drawn to the vibrant wall inside, where the words "R + D" and descriptive text glow under bright lights. The wall speaks of exploring relationships between humans and technology—a fitting reflection of my own thoughts as I watch others interact with displays and information here. Standing still, I feel both a sense of anticipation and quiet contemplation, pondering the ongoing dialogue between human invention and the unknown future it creates. There is an undercurrent of excitement, yet also a feeling of respectful reverence for the collective intellect and imagination displayed.
